name: Chinese Potatoes with Chili Beans
recipeIngredient: 4 Medium Potatoes, cut into thick chunks
1 Large Chili Pepper, seeded and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of water to a boil. Add the potatoes and cook until they are just tender but not overcooked. Drain and set aside.
2. Heat oil in a large frying pan. Stir fry the green onions and chili pepper in balsamic vinegar for about 1 minute, stirring occasionally.
3. Add the garlic and stir fry for an additional few seconds.
4. Return the potatoes to the pan with the beans and soy sauce. Season with salt and pepper as desired.
5. Cook everything together until the vegetables are heated through.
6. Sprinkle with sesame seeds before serving.
